params.name: Lennon's Guitar
params.source:
* Fragment Crafting (1.5%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF), Wishing (0.14%)
* [[Leeku]] - [[Rare Rent]]
params.description:
On Sep 27, 1958, John Lennon purchased this legendary electric guitar in Hamburg, Germany.

From the beginning of the Beatles to the famous Shea stadium concert, this guitar accompanied John during his time as a member of the Beatles, also the happiest time of his life. It was not a guitar of a famous brand but it was the most cherished one for Lennon. It is said that this was the last guitar John Lennon played before the assassination.
